title: WELD: The Autonomous Economy
tagline: A complete no-backend economy: browse ranked-by-verified-reputation sellers, place a sealed+signed order, watch it survive a tamper-refusing autonomous agent relay — reputation, custody, seal, and signature provable end to end.
holy_shit: Every layer of real economic trust — live inventory, AES-sealed orders, SHA-256 custody proofs, ECDSA seller-signed receipts, signed reputation — feeds a tamper-refusing autonomous agent relay where any corrupt byte halts the whole chain, entirely in your browser with zero backend.
powered_by: The Trusted Exchange's signed-reputation marketplace welded to The Sovereign Handoff's tamper-refusing autonomous relay
weld: Run the full Trusted Exchange pipeline (live availability → AES-sealed order → SHA-256 custody → ECDSA receipt → signed reputation), then inject the complete notarized economic packet as the Sovereign Handoff relay genesis so every autonomous hop verifies custody and signature before forwarding.
agent_scenario: When you need a zero-backend economy where sealed, custody-proven, seller-signed orders with verified-reputation sellers flow through a tamper-refusing autonomous agent pipeline and every stage — reputation, seal, custody, signature — is independently verifiable in the browser.
author: kody-w + Copilot
